title: Two Sum
description:
Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

**Input Format:**
The first line contains an integer N, the size of the array.
The second line contains N space-separated integers, the array elements.
The third line contains an integer target.

**Output Format:**
Print two space-separated integers representing the indices (0-indexed) of the two numbers. Assume exactly one solution exists.

**Example Input:**
4
2 7 11 15
9

**Example Output:**
0 1

title: Palindrome Number
description:
Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome, and false otherwise.

**Input Format:**
A single line containing the integer x.

**Output Format:**
Print 'true' if the number is a palindrome, otherwise print 'false'.

**Example Input:**
121

**Example Output:**
true

title: Valid Parentheses
description:
Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.

**Input Format:**
A single line containing the string s.

**Output Format:**
Print 'true' if valid, otherwise 'false'.

**Example Input:**
()[]{}

**Example Output:**
true

title: Reverse String
description:
Write a program that reverses a given string.

**Input Format:**
A single line containing a string without spaces.

**Output Format:**
The reversed string.

**Example Input:**
hello

**Example Output:**
olleh

title: Maximum Subarray
description:
Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum, and return its sum.

**Input Format:**
The first line contains an integer N.
The second line contains N space-separated integers.

**Output Format:**
Print a single integer representing the maximum sum.

**Example Input:**
9
-2 1 -3 4 -1 2 1 -5 4

**Example Output:**
6

title: Contains Duplicate
description:
Given an integer array nums, return true if any value appears at least twice in the array, and return false if every element is distinct.

**Input Format:**
The first line contains N.
The second line contains N space-separated integers.

**Output Format:**
Print 'true' or 'false'.

**Example Input:**
4
1 2 3 1

**Example Output:**
true

title: Climbing Stairs
description:
You are climbing a staircase. It takes n steps to reach the top. Each time you can either climb 1 or 2 steps. In how many distinct ways can you climb to the top?

**Input Format:**
A single integer n.

**Output Format:**
A single integer representing the number of ways.

**Example Input:**
3

**Example Output:**
3

title: Missing Number
description:
Given an array nums containing n distinct numbers in the range [0, n], return the only number in the range that is missing from the array.

**Input Format:**
The first line is N.
The second line contains N space-separated integers.

**Output Format:**
The missing integer.

**Example Input:**
3
3 0 1

**Example Output:**
2

title: Power of Two
description:
Given an integer n, return true if it is a power of two. Otherwise, return false.

**Input Format:**
A single integer n.

**Output Format:**
'true' or 'false'

**Example Input:**
16

**Example Output:**
true

title: Fizz Buzz
description:
Given an integer n, print a string array answer (1-indexed) where:
answer[i] == "FizzBuzz" if i is divisible by 3 and 5.
answer[i] == "Fizz" if i is divisible by 3.
answer[i] == "Buzz" if i is divisible by 5.
answer[i] == i (as a string) if none of the above conditions are true.

**Input Format:**
An integer n.

**Output Format:**
A space-separated sequence of answers.

**Example Input:**
3

**Example Output:**
1 2 Fizz

testCases.expectedOutput: 1 2 Fizz 4 Buzz Fizz 7 8 Fizz Buzz 11 Fizz 13 14 FizzBuzz
